name: ExtensionBiologicallyDerivedProductDispense_MatchStatus
title: R5: Indicates the type of matching associated with the dispense (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `BiologicallyDerivedProductDispense.matchStatus` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`BiologicallyDerivedProductDispense.matchStatus` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `BiologicallyDerivedProductDispense.matchStatus` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `BiologicallyDerivedProductDispense.matchStatus` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `BiologicallyDerivedProductDispense` is not mapped.
Element `BiologicallyDerivedProductDispense.matchStatus` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

binding.description: Describes the type of matching between the recipient and origin of the dispensed product.
